_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromin-deficient fibroblasts fail to form perineurium in vitro.

_contextSnippet: Western blot analysis confirmed that fibroblasts from Nf1 (−/−) embryos contained no detectable neurofibromin, while heterozygous cells showed a reduction as compared to wild-type cells
details: Heterozygous cells showed reduced neurofibromin levels compared to wild-type cells by Western blot analysis
